hero.name: Mongkhon Wichaiphap
hero.description: A highly motivated Computer Engineering fresh graduate from RMUTP, eager to learn new technologies and give my best to every project.

portfolio.title: My Projects
portfolio.subtitle: Here are the key projects I have developed.

projects.title: Money Flow (Final Project)
projects.description: A financial management app with UI built in Flutter and Dart. Features data visualization, financial metrics calculation, and primarily utilizes JSON for data export flexibility.

projects.title: Secure Authentication API
projects.description: A secure RESTful API developed with Golang and Fiber. Implemented JWT (Access & Refresh Tokens) with HttpOnly cookies, secured by SHA-256 and bcrypt hashing.

projects.title: Lab Backend (RESTful API)
projects.description: Built a RESTful API using Node.js and TypeScript. Configured PostgreSQL with Docker, utilized Prisma ORM, and managed data storage in JSON format.

projects.title: Auth Cookie Authentication
projects.description: An authentication and session management project utilizing secure cookies to enhance web application security and manage user access effectively.

projects.title: Vite Responsive Website
projects.description: A web frontend project focused on responsive design, ensuring a seamless user experience across all screen sizes. Powered by Vite for fast performance.

projects.title: Dummy App
projects.description: A prototype application built to test UI component layouts, system architecture, and basic data integration before full-scale development.

projects.title: Playwright Automation Test
projects.description: An automated web testing project using Playwright. Designed to simulate real user interactions and perform robust End-to-End (E2E) testing to ensure application stability.

projects.title: Robot Framework Automation
projects.description: An automated testing infrastructure built with Robot Framework. Utilizes a Keyword-Driven testing approach to create highly readable and maintainable test scripts for complex systems.

projects.title: Cinema Management System
projects.description: A full-stack cinema system featuring a decoupled architecture. It separates the Frontend (user interface) and Backend (API management) into two repositories for superior scalability.

projects.title: Full-Stack POS & Security Dashboard
projects.description: A robust POS and authentication system built with Feature-Driven Architecture. Features include a shopping cart, Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) dashboard, activity logging, and high-security JWT (HttpOnly Cookies) with OAuth support.

about.title: About & Experience
about.description: As a fresh Computer Engineering graduate, I gained practical experience as an IT Support Intern, troubleshooting Windows/macOS and hardware issues. I am highly passionate about software development and ready to contribute my skills to real-world applications.

posReview.title: Full-Stack POS & Security Dashboard
posReview.subtitle: A Point of Sale system that goes beyond a beautiful and intuitive interface, built upon a robust Enterprise-grade Authentication foundation. It distinctly separates the storefront for regular users and the backend dashboard for administrators.
posReview.feature1_desc: The sales management screen is designed for speed and user-friendliness, displaying products with images, prices, and 'Best Seller' badges. It features a real-time shopping cart that instantly updates quantities and totals, minimizing calculation errors.
posReview.feature1_li3: ✨ Responsive layout for Tablet and Desktop
posReview.feature2_desc: Beyond sales, the system includes an Admin Dashboard for comprehensive security oversight. Monitor Activity Logs, total logins, failed/blocked attempts, and new user registrations in real-time.
posReview.feature2_li1: 🔐 JWT via HttpOnly Cookies to prevent XSS & CSRF
posReview.feature2_li2: 🔐 Strict Password Policy (requires special chars and numbers)
posReview.feature2_li3: 🔐 Rate Limiting to prevent Brute Force attacks
posReview.feature3_desc: Features real-time processing of Revenue, Cost of Goods Sold (COGS), Expenses, and Net Profit. Includes a highly granular Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) user management system.
posReview.feature3_li2: 👥 Assign roles like SUPER ADMIN, MANAGER, CASHIER, etc.
